description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a walled property, featuring a spacious single-story main building with a red gabled roof and white exterior walls. The front yard is landscaped with a circular driveway, a prominent pink-blossomed tree, and a paved entrance path leading to the main door. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by green lawn, decorative shrubs, and a paved patio area. There is a detached garage or outbuilding with a dark roof adjacent to the main house, and the property is enclosed by a decorative perimeter wall with greenery. Large windows and glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. The overall layout is symmetrical, with clear zones for recreation, parking, and entry.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a red gabled roof, white walls, landscaped front yard, swimming pool, and a detached garage, all enclosed by a decorative wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, pink-blossomed tree, and the swimming pool in the backyard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard lawn, swimming pool, and the back facade of the bungalow with patio and garden features.
description_view_2: View from the opposite end of the front, showing the driveway, garage, and the main entrance with the landscaped front yard.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the garage, side lawn, and the arrangement of the pool and garden relative to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
